## Summary

<!-- One sentence describing what you want. -->

## Motivation / use case

<!-- Why is this useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution

<!-- How would you implement this? (Optional — ideas welcome, not required.) -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Any alternative approaches you have thought about. -->

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- How would we know this feature is done and working correctly?

## Additional context

<!-- Any other information, diagrams, or links. -->
